sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1389" key="a)dikomaxe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδῐκο-μαχέω</orth>, <sense id="n1389.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fight unfairly</tr_>, esp. in the law-courts, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.29</biblScope> </bibl>; dub. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:154" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.154</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
